description: Letter, probably, in a mixture of Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely 11th century. The addressee is instructed to obtain a certain amount of oil for the Iraqi synagogue, the Palestinian synagogue, and for Dammūh. Then mentions the synagogue of Cairo. The Arabic-script portions still need to be deciphered. ASE.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
